records.ety: [L. desideratus, p. p. of desiderare to desire, miss. See Desire, and cf. Desideratum.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Desiderated; p. pr. & vb. n. Desiderating.]

defs: To desire; to feel the want of; to lack; to miss; to want.
quotes: Pray have the goodness to point out one word missing that ought to have been there -- please to insert a desiderated stanza. You can not.
Men were beginning . . . to desiderate for them an actual abode of fire.
